phrases.intent_en: Ask which gate to enter for your section
phrases.text_local: C'est quelle porte pour ma tribune ?
phrases.pronunciation: seh kel port poor mah tree-BOON
phrases.cultural_note: Check your ticket for the gate number before arriving. Staff can redirect you if needed.

responses.english: It is gate H, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: seh lah port ahsh, swee-VAY lay pah-NOH
responses.local: C'est la porte H, suivez les panneaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy match tickets
phrases.text_local: Où acheter des billets pour le match ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo ahsh-TAY day bee-YEH poor luh MATCH
phrases.cultural_note: Buy on the official PSG website or app. Big matches (Marseille, Champions League) sell out fast. Resale sites are expensive — the billetterie at the stadium sometimes has last-minute tickets.

responses.english: Tickets are on sale online or at the stadium box office.
responses.phonetic: lay bee-YAY sohn tahn vahnt ahn LEEN-yuh oo oh gee-SHAY doo stad
responses.local: Les billets sont en vente en ligne ou au guichet du stade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if food and drinks are available inside
phrases.text_local: Il y a des points de restauration à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah day pwahn duh res-toh-rah-SYOHN ah lan-tay-RYUHR
phrases.cultural_note: Concession stands are available inside the stadium but lines can be long at halftime.

responses.english: Yes, there are refreshment stands on every level.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah day boo-VET ah shahk nee-VOH
responses.local: Oui, il y a des buvettes à chaque niveau.

phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a des visites guidées du stade ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah day vee-ZEET ghee-DAY doo STAHD
phrases.cultural_note: Stadium tours run on non-match days and include the locker rooms, tunnel, and pitch-side access. Book on the PSG website. The club museum showcases PSG's history.

responses.english: Stadium tours are on Tuesdays and Saturdays. Book online.
responses.phonetic: lay vee-ZEET doo stad sohn luh mar-DEE ay luh sahm-DEE. ray-zehr-VAY ahn LEEN-yuh
responses.local: Les visites du stade sont le mardi et le samedi. Réservez en ligne.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the PSG merchandise shop is
phrases.text_local: Où est la boutique officielle du PSG ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah boo-TEEK oh-fee-SYEL doo pay-ess-ZHAY
phrases.cultural_note: The main boutique is at the stadium. There's also a megastore on the Champs-Élysées. Match-day prices are the same, but expect long lines after the game.

responses.english: The PSG shop is outside the stadium, on the Paris stand side.
responses.phonetic: lah boo-TEEK pay-ess-ZHAY eh tah lex-tay-RYUHR doo stad, koh-TAY tree-BOON pah-REE
responses.local: La boutique PSG est à l'extérieur du stade, côté tribune Paris.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which metro station is closest to the stadium
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la station de métro la plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah stah-SYOHN duh may-TROH lah ploo prosh
phrases.cultural_note: Porte de Saint-Cloud (line 9) is the closest metro station to Parc des Princes.

responses.english: Porte de Saint-Cloud, it is a five-minute walk.
responses.phonetic: port duh san KLOOD, seh tah sank mee-NOOT ah pyay
responses.local: Porte de Saint-Cloud, c'est à cinq minutes à pied.
